_meta.description: Source registry for thesis claims and additions to the dashboard. Each entry has a stable id referenced from companies.json records' `sources` field (and eventually explorer/matrix prose). The 2026-05-29/30 session attached sources to ~60 records added/enriched from the 7 Citrini Research memos in `memos/` plus web verifications.

schema.id: stable kebab-case identifier referenced from data records
schema.title: human title
schema.author: publisher / author
schema.date: ISO date of the source (publish date for memos)
schema.notes: what the source covers / why it's cited

sources.title: Thematic Primer: Humanoid Robots — A Secular Story at a Cyclical Price
sources.author: Citrini Research
sources.notes: Full humanoid teardown — Unitree BOM, actuation, sensing/perception, compute, motion control, power & energy, tele-op, autonomy SW, industrial + humanoid OEMs. Source for component-supplier additions and humanoid-OEM gap-fill.

sources.title: Robotics Update — Teradyne's Vulcan Contract Win, China Supply Chain Tour, Robo Basket Winners
sources.author: Citrini Research
sources.notes: Teradyne / Universal Robots / Amazon Vulcan reveal + China actuator supply-chain tour. Source for Schaeffler humanoid joint module, Keli torque sensors, Wolong motors, Ningbo Shuanglin roller screws, TER enrichment.

sources.title: Carving Up the TPU — Leftovers for Jensen or Just Gravy on the AI Trade?
sources.author: Citrini Research
sources.notes: Google TPU custom-ASIC counter-trend going mainstream; OCS/Project Apollo; 1.6T optical step-up. Source for MediaTek (TPU v7 co-design), MACOM (200G photodiodes), SiTime (MEMS timing), Lumentum OCS enrichment.

sources.title: Semis Memo: Muscle Memory
sources.author: Citrini Research
sources.notes: Memory-testing sub-chain, ALD/GAAFET, silicon-photonics foundries (GFS/UMC), advanced-packaging bonders, lagging-edge memory squeeze. Source for FormFactor, Onto, ASM International, Cohu, Powertech, Hanmi.

sources.title: Let There Be Light — Revisiting the Optics & AI Connectivity Theme
sources.author: Citrini Research
sources.notes: Photonics enabler chokepoints (MOCVD, wafer bonding, SOI, InP); Himax/FOCI FAU for TSMC COUPE; Apple smart-glasses angle. Source for AIXTRON, SUSS MicroTec, Soitec, Nokia, FOCI, Ciena, Furukawa, Sumitomo Electric, Veeco, AAOI, Tower, HIMX enrichment, STM SiPh angle.

sources.title: Agentic Utilities — Always On, Never Prompted
sources.author: Citrini Research
sources.notes: Agentic AI = 25x chatbot traffic, ~80% east-west; M2M ~10→537 EB/mo by 2034 (Nokia). Source for CSCO, EQIX, DLR + the net 'east-west traffic' demand thesis. Majority of memo deliberately out-of-scope (software/CDN/payments/cyber).

sources.title: Semis Memo: Supply Chain Inheritance — Power & Analog Semis, CPUs in the Agentic Era, Neoclouds, Material Bottlenecks, Korea Unlocked
sources.author: Citrini Research
sources.notes: 800V HVDC AI 'inheriting' EV/solar SiC/GaN supply chain; agentic-era CPUs/orchestration plane; SST inflection; AI materials. Source for Wolfspeed, onsemi, STM, Navitas, ASPEED, LOTES, FIT Hon Teng, and the dci power-semi chain entry.

sources.title: Citrini Research Robotics Thematic Universe (workbook)
sources.author: Citrini Research
sources.notes: Private structured ticker universe (Humanoid OEM, Industrial OEM, Actuators, Sensing, Compute, Power & Energy, Tele-op, Autonomy SW). Source for the 12 robot-maker OEM additions (TSLA, Hyundai, UBTech, Estun, ABB, Midea/KUKA, Kawasaki, Rainbow Robotics, XPeng, Doosan, Seiko Epson, Teradyne).

sources.title: Kioxia Holdings Lists on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market
sources.author: Kioxia Holdings
sources.notes: Relisting press release confirming ticker 285A on TSE Prime. Source for the Kioxia ticker fix (was 000270.KS which is Kia Corp).

sources.title: Samsung Electronics To Become Largest Shareholder in Rainbow Robotics, Accelerating Future Robot Development
sources.author: Samsung Newsroom
sources.notes: Samsung exercises call option to 35% stake. Source for Rainbow Robotics (277810.KQ) Samsung-backed humanoid context.

sources.title: Yahoo Finance ticker / suffix verifications (May 2026)
sources.author: Yahoo Finance
sources.notes: Verified suffix correctness for Kioxia (285A.T), SICC (688234.SH), Empyrean (301269.SZ), FOCI (3363.TWO TPEx), Apex Dynamics (4583.TW TWSE), Rainbow Robotics (277810.KQ KOSDAQ).

sources.title: joeedessa/ai-hardware-research — this dashboard's GitHub repo
sources.author: self
sources.notes: Public repo. Widget fetches data/*.json via the raw.githubusercontent.com BASE URL.
